title: Fix my Enchantments!
description: This is a light weight that Fixes one crucial feature that is in every one of Silver's Project that contains custom Enchantments
body:
# Description:
This is a light weight that Fixes one crucial feature that is in every one of Silver's Project that contains custom Enchantments!

This datapack allows players to actually find these enchantments through the enchanting table now! instead of needing to craft them.

and everytime Silver releases another enchantment project, this datapack will always be updated!


### Others:
if your curious about what datapacks this will be effected by, you can check here: [Way too many Enchantments!](https://modrinth.com/collection/90b6VDPP).
